ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

document_pairing.method: Certificate references contract 5999-25; invoice bears same contract number 5999-25. Seller on invoice matches consignor on certificate. Buyer on invoice matches consignee on certificate. Invoice number 25164 found in invoice file. Certificate file page 2 contains embedded copy of same invoice — verification conducted against separate invoice file (Document B) per rule 8.5.0.

sanity_check.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' identifieras som Seller i fakturan. Certifikatets consignee 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd' identifieras som Buyer i fakturan. Kontraktsnummer 5999-25 överensstämmer. Parningsvalidering godkänd.

locations.context: Seller field: 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, Stora Åvägen 21, SE 436 34 Askim, Sweden'
Postal Address footer: 'Stora Åvägen 21, SE 436 34 Askim, Sweden'

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate references 'Contract 5999-25' which is a contract number, not an LC reference. No bankterm context (L/C, Letter of Credit, Documentary Credit) identified.

candidates.raw_text: 45 Hamada St., Northern Industry Zone, P.O.B 4056, 77140 Ashdod, Israel
candidates.normalized_text: 45 hamada st., northern industry zone, p.o.b 4056, 77140 ashdod, israel

candidates.raw_text: 45 Hamada Street, Northern Industrial Zone, Ashdod 7752853, Israel
candidates.normalized_text: 45 hamada street, northern industrial zone, ashdod 7752853, israel

candidates.source: Invoice page 1, Description of goods field
Invoice page 1, Country of origin field

candidates.raw_text: The exporter of the products covered by this document custom authorization No. SE/TTA/026220 declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of European Community preferential origin.
candidates.source: Invoice page 1, HS Code declaration area

evidence.description: Certificate consignor name matches invoice seller name exactly
Certificate consignor country matches invoice seller country
Certificate consignee name matches invoice buyer name exactly
Certificate consignee country matches invoice buyer country
Certificate goods description core term 'Whitewood' matches invoice description 'Whitewood'
Certificate quantity 273,233 m3 matches invoice Total M3 273,233
Certificate origin 'European Union / Sweden' verified against invoice 'Country of origin: Sweden' and 'European Community preferential origin' declaration
evidence.invoice_text: Country of origin: Sweden; 'these products are of European Community preferential origin'
evidence.invoice_location: Page 1, Country of origin field and origin declaration

consignor.certificate_value: Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, Stora Åvägen 21, SE436 34, ASKIM, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, Stora Åvägen 21, SE 436 34 Askim, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' found exactly in invoice Seller field, header branding, signature block, and footer.
MATCH — Certificate states 'Sweden', invoice Seller address states 'Sweden'. Additionally EORI prefix 'SE' and IBAN prefix 'SE' confirm Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found explicitly in invoice Seller field

consignor.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' identifieras exakt i fakturans Seller-fält som 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB'. Företagsnamnet är identiskt efter normalisering. Land Sweden överensstämmer exakt. Adress Stora Åvägen 21, SE 436 34 Askim överensstämmer. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB', Sweden. Invoice seller: 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB', Sweden. Exact name match, exact country match. Rule 4.1.0 gives immediate MATCH. No need to proceed to sequential testing 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

consignee.certificate_value: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd, 45 Hamada St., Northern Industry Zone, P.O.B 4056, 77140 Ashdod, Israel
consignee.invoice_value: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd, 45 Hamada Street, Northern Industrial Zone, Ashdod 7752853, Israel

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'Buyer' field with named party — this is the authoritative consignee per 4.2.0.2
comparison_steps.result: Buyer field identified: 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd'

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name to invoice Buyer name
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd' = 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd'. Exact match.
MATCH — Certificate states 'Israel', invoice Buyer address states 'Israel'.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning — Buyer field is primary invoicing field
rules_applied.outcome: Buyer field used as authoritative consignee

consignee.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd' identifieras exakt i fakturans Buyer-fält som 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd'. Namn är identiska. Land Israel överensstämmer. Adressvariationer (St. vs Street, Industry Zone vs Industrial Zone, olika postnummerformat) är smärre formateringsskillnader som inte påverkar bedömningen per 4.2.4. MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd', Israel. Invoice buyer: 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd', Israel. Exact name match. Country match. Minor address formatting differences (St./Street, Industry/Industrial Zone, postcode format) do not affect MATCH per rule 4.2.4 — only company name and country are decisive.

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in certificate: 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP'. Compare to invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Invoice Description of goods: 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP'. The core term 'Whitewood' is identical. Specifications 'KD 18%' vs 'KD18%' differ only by space (allowed normalization). 'LP' is identical.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses 'Swedish Whitewood' while invoice uses 'Whitewood'. 'Swedish' is a geographical adjective prefix corresponding to the certificate's stated origin country Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: Per rule 4.3.4, geographical adjective prefix matching the certificate's origin country is a non-identity-bearing addition. The core term 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' can be identified in both documents. Not a MISMATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6 includes '74 packages' (number and kind of packages). This is packaging information, not part of the goods identity.
comparison_steps.result: Non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4. Invoice also confirms 'Packages (nos): 74'.

rules_applied.description: Kontrollerad textmatchning — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' identifieras i fakturan som 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP'
Geografiskt prefix 'Swedish' ignoreras — det motsvarar certifikatets ursprungsland Sweden och är icke-identitetsbärande
Central normalisering — mellanslag i 'KD 18%' vs 'KD18%' normaliseras

goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Swedish Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' kan identifieras i fakturan som 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP'. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' återfinns i fakturan efter tillåten normalisering (mellanslag). Prefixet 'Swedish' är ett geografiskt adjektiv som motsvarar certifikatets ursprungsland (Sweden) och är ett icke-identitetsbärande tillägg per 4.3.4. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Swedish Whitewood, KD 18%, LP'. Invoice goods: 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP'. Identity-bearing core: 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP'. In invoice: 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP' — space difference only in 'KD 18%' vs 'KD18%' → allowed normalization per section 4. 'Swedish' prefix is geographical adjective = origin country Sweden → non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. MATCH per 4.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '273,233 m3'. Numeric value: 273.233, unit: m3. Both present.
Search for numeric value 273.233 in invoice with unit m3.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Invoice states 'Total M3: 273,233' and also 'Total m3: 273,233' in Other conditions section. The value 273.233 (after decimal normalization of comma as decimal separator, standard in European context) is identical.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll — numeriskt värde 273,233 identifieras exakt i fakturan som 'Total M3: 273,233'
Kvantitetsuppgift i certifikatet innehåller numeriskt värde och enhet (m3)

quantity.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '273,233 m3' (box 7) identifieras exakt i fakturan som 'Total M3: 273,233'. Det numeriska värdet 273,233 är identiskt. Enheten m3 är konsistent. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate quantity: 273,233 m3 (box 7). Invoice: 'Total M3: 273,233'. Numeric values identical (273.233). Unit m3 consistent. Direct identification per 4.4.1. No calculation needed. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: Sweden; 'these products are of European Community preferential origin'

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has explicit field 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Additionally, invoice contains declaration: 'these products are of European Community preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Union' and 'Sweden'. Invoice states 'Country of origin: Sweden' and 'European Community preferential origin'.
comparison_steps.result: Sweden is an EU member state. Certificate's 'European Union' is verified by invoice's 'European Community preferential origin' declaration. Certificate's 'Sweden' is verified by invoice's 'Country of origin: Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU Sweden' (EU + one specific EU member state). Invoice has explicit EU origin statement ('European Community preferential origin').
comparison_steps.result: Per 4.5.4.2.1: Certificate has EU combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice has explicit EU origin declaration in dedicated field. No contradicting origin info. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice contains any non-EU origins not listed in certificate.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice states only 'Sweden' as country of origin. No non-EU origins present. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU-medlemsland — Sweden is EU member, 'European Union' verified via 'European Community preferential origin' in invoice
Generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande täcker 'EU Sweden' — invoice has explicit EU origin declaration
Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer i fakturan som saknas i certifikatet

country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'European Union' och 'Sweden'. Fakturan har explicit fält 'Country of origin: Sweden' och innehåller deklaration 'these products are of European Community preferential origin'. Sweden är EU-medlemsstat. Certifikatets 'Sweden' verifieras direkt mot fakturans 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Certifikatets 'European Union' verifieras mot fakturans EU-ursprungsdeklaration per 4.5.4.2.1. Inga motstridiga ursprungsuppgifter i fakturan. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'European Union, Sweden'. Invoice: 'Country of origin: Sweden' + 'European Community preferential origin' declaration. Step 1: Sweden → found in invoice Country of origin field → verified. Step 2: European Union → invoice contains 'European Community preferential origin' declaration → this is an explicit EU origin statement in a dedicated section → per 4.5.4.2.1, cert='EU Sweden', invoice has explicit EU statement → MATCH. Step 3: No non-EU origins in invoice → no contradiction per 4.5.4.1. Overall: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.description: LC-undantag — kontroll av Letter of Credit
rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate.

Document A (Certificate of Origin) identified as certificate file. Document B (Invoice) identified as invoice file. Certificate page 2 contains embedded invoice copy — verification conducted against Document B per rule 8.5.0.
Consignor, consignee and contract number all match between certificate and invoice.
Consignor 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' found exactly in invoice Seller field.
Invoice Buyer field used as authoritative consignee.
Exact name match: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd.
Core term 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' identified in invoice as 'Whitewood, KD18%, LP'.
273,233 m3 identifieras exakt i fakturan som 'Total M3: 273,233'.
Sweden is EU member. Invoice confirms Sweden as origin and EU preferential origin.
Certificate: EU + Sweden. Invoice: explicit EU preferential origin declaration + Country of origin: Sweden.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH on goods description due to 'Swedish Whitewood' vs 'Whitewood'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.3.4, 'Swedish' is a geographical adjective prefix corresponding to the certificate's origin country (Sweden). It is a non-identity-bearing addition. The core product identity 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' is preserved in both documents.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH on goods description due to space difference in 'KD 18%' vs 'KD18%'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Extra spaces are allowed normalization per section 4 central normalization rules.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH on origin because 'European Union' in certificate vs 'European Community' in invoice declaration
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 'European Union' and 'European Community' are historically equivalent terms for EU origin purposes. The invoice explicitly declares 'European Community preferential origin' which verifies 'European Union'. Additionally, 'Sweden' is verified directly via Country of origin field.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, mottagaren Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd, varubeskrivningen Whitewood KD 18% LP, kvantiteten 273,233 m3 och ursprungslandet Sverige/EU kan alla verifieras. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-26D-464755 (utfärdat 2026-02-27) verifierat mot faktura 25164 (daterad 2026-02-27). Avsändare: Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB. Mottagare: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd.

sections.certificate_value: Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, Stora Åvägen 21, SE436 34, ASKIM, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB, Stora Åvägen 21, SE 436 34 Askim, Sweden (Seller)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning — consignor identifieras exakt i fakturans Seller-fält
sections.motivation: Företagsnamn 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' identiskt i båda dokumenten. Land Sweden överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd, 45 Hamada St., Northern Industry Zone, P.O.B 4056, 77140 Ashdod, Israel
sections.invoice_value: Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd, 45 Hamada Street, Northern Industrial Zone, Ashdod 7752853, Israel (Buyer)
sections.motivation: Företagsnamn 'Ashdod Timber Trade Ltd' identiskt. Land Israel överensstämmer. Smärre adressvariationer (St./Street, Industry/Industrial Zone, postnummerformat) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning med tillåten normalisering av mellanslag och geografiskt prefix
sections.motivation: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Whitewood, KD 18%, LP' identifieras i fakturan. 'Swedish' är geografiskt prefix som motsvarar ursprungslandet och är icke-identitetsbärande. Mellanslag i 'KD 18%' normaliseras.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll — numeriskt värde identifieras exakt i fakturan
sections.motivation: Numeriskt värde 273,233 identifieras exakt i fakturans 'Total M3: 273,233'. Enhet m3 är konsistent.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin: Sweden; 'these products are of European Community preferential origin'
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering — Sweden verifieras direkt, European Union verifieras via EU-preferensursprungsdeklaration i fakturan
sections.motivation: Sweden identifieras i fakturans 'Country of origin: Sweden'. European Union verifieras via fakturans deklaration 'European Community preferential origin'. Sweden är EU-medlemsstat. Inga motstridiga ursprungsuppgifter.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All applicable checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85 and status MATCH. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints MATCH. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with comparison_result IDENTICAL.
